name: hermes-kafka-connector
title: ServiceNow Hermes Kafka Connector
description:
Kafka Connect sink connector that streams data from Confluent Cloud
into a ServiceNow instance Hermes Kafka cluster using mutual TLS (mTLS)
authentication. Enables real-time data ingestion into ServiceNow workflows
without requiring VPN or PrivateLink. Supports pass-through bytes
(ByteArrayConverter), full header preservation, and hash-by-key
partitioning. Requires an mTLS certificate from the ServiceNow Instance
PKI Certificate Generator.
requirements: mTLS certificate from Instance PKI Certificate Generator
ServiceNow instance with Hermes Messaging Service activated
